content: The Single Sign-On section allows you to enable/disable third-party authentication using SAML, thereby providing a quicker, easier and more secure way to access the space for users.

comment.text: The Single Sign-On section allows users to enable or disable third-party authentication using SAML, providing a quicker and more secure way to access the space. This translation key is used in the portal settings page, where it appears as a title for a section explaining the functionality of SSO.

usage.context:
<StyledSsoPage
 hideSettings={serviceProviderSettings}
 hideMetadata={spMetadata}
 withoutExternalLink={!singleSignOnUrl}
 >
 <Text className="intro-text settings_unavailable">{t("SsoIntro")}</Text>
 
 {singleSignOnUrl ? (
 <Link
 className="link-learn-more"
 color={currentColorScheme.main?.accent}

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'domenə' (to the domain) is used instead of 'space' (məkan/sahə). In the context of ONLYOFFICE DocSpace, 'space' refers to a specific workspace/environment, not a network domain.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Birdəfəlik Giriş bölməsi SAML-dən istifadə edərək üçüncü tərəfin doğrulamasını aktivləşdirməyə/deaktiv etməyə imkan verir, beləliklə, istifadəçilər üçün məkana daxil olmaq üçün daha sürətli, asan və daha təhlükəsiz yol təqdim edir.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The technical acronym 'SAML' was incorrectly translated as 'SML', which refers to a different technology (System Modeling Language) and is a technical error.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Kertakirjautumisosion avulla voit ottaa käyttöön/poistaa kolmannen osapuolen todennuksen käyttäen SAML:ää, tarjoten käyttäjille nopeamman, helpomman ja turvallisemman pääsyn tilaan.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'prin implicarea autentificării de la terțe SAML' is nonsensical in Romanian. It incorrectly attempts to translate 'third-party authentication using SAML' and results in a broken sentence structure ('third SAML authentication involvement').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Secţiunea Single Sign-On (Autentificare unică) vă permite să activați/să dezactivați autentificarea prin terți folosind SAML, oferind astfel utilizatorilor un mod mai rapid, mai uşor şi mai sigur de accesare a spaţiului.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The English text refers to accessing 'the space', while the Russian translation uses 'порталу' (the portal). In the context of ONLYOFFICE DocSpace, 'space' and 'portal' are distinct entities.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Раздел «Единый вход» позволяет включать / отключать стороннюю аутентификацию с использованием SAML, тем самым обеспечивая более быстрый, простой и безопасный способ доступа к пространству для пользователей.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation incorrectly adds 'two-factor' (ද්වි-සාධක) to the text. The English source refers to 'third-party authentication' (තෙවන පාර්ශ්ව), not two-factor authentication.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: SAML භාවිතයෙන් තෙවන පාර්ශ්වීය සත්‍යාපනය සක්‍රිය/අබල කිරීමට තනි පිවිසුම් කොටස ඔබට ඉඩ සලසයි, එමඟින් පරිශීලකයින් සඳහා අවකාශය වෙත ප්‍රවේශ වීමට ඉක්මන්, පහසු සහ වඩාත් ආරක්‍ෂිත ක්‍රමයක් සපයයි.
